findings_delta.summary: Stale test credentials in repo-root .env: LOGIN_EMAIL/LOGIN_PASSWORD return 401 from POST /auth/login. Default `pnpm e2e` auth setup fails until rotated; suites runnable via env override (LOGIN_EMAIL=admin LOGIN_PASSWORD=admin123).
Canonical test account `admin` has isAdmin:true; spec assumed a non-admin canonical login. Drift noted, not changed.
Extra git remote `origin-local` exists alongside `origin`. Out of PHASE 0 scope; flagged for W-D cleanup review.

Branches kept (not provably merged by git cherry): fix/ml-agents-err-001-status, fix/ml-source-disclosure, fix/ml-story-operator-leak. Changes appear folded into batch commit ef7df30; verify then delete in W-D.

Playwright baseline red under default config: 51 passed / 28 failed. Failure classes: prod-domain authed sweep vs local storageState (17), specs requiring dedicated repro stacks on 8010/3010+8012/3012 (9), @aether.local settings-email data precondition (1), manual-verification aggregate sweep with 12 failed captures (1). Pre-existing; none introduced in PHASE 0.
14 legacy .claude/agents files outside the §0.2 roster left untouched; roster reconciliation documented.
Untracked .env.bak-predeploy present at repo root; left in place per scope (scheduled for reviewed deletion manifest in W-D).

ML-adv-001's awaiting-QA m{} monitor fix FAILED QA: perl -ne 'print if m{...}' exits 0 regardless of match, so monitor-tail.sh captured EVERY line (live-matches.log flooded to 14,212 clean-traffic lines). Found and re-fixed within the row's QA (grep -qP), flooded log quarantined, monitor restarted, selectivity proven by synthetic injection.
